item.title: GE Medical Systems, LLC: Revolution Ascend, computed tomography, Model Numbers 6969000-100 and 6969000-300 Recall
item.product: Revolution Ascend, computed tomography, Model Numbers 6969000-100 and 6969000-300
item.summary: GE HealthCare has become aware of a potential security vulnerability impacting AW Server deployed via Edison Health Link (EHL) based CT Smart Subscription used in conjunction with certain Revolution Apex, Revolution Ascend, and Revolution CT systems. Product details: Revolution Ascend, computed tomography, Model Numbers 6969000-100 and 6969000-300
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
